response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience across multiple languages and domains, but his primary focus has been on web, mobile, and embedded systems rather than C++ or industrial automation. While he has some C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments), it is not recent or deep enough to meet the role's core C++ and STL requirements. His expertise in Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang does not align well with the job's emphasis on high-performance, scalable C++ systems. His security and cybersecurity experience is also unclear.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across diverse technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang, Java, C++)
Demonstrated ability to build high-performance, low-latency applications (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical leadership (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Lacks recent and deep C++/STL experience required for the role (primary focus is Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang)
No clear evidence of industrial automation, IoT, or cybersecurity (IEC 62443) experience
Cloud platform experience (Microsoft Azure) is not mentioned, despite being advantageous for the role
